get.description: Search hashtags. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.search_hashtags_v1(query="love")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: It is recommended to use /v2/search/accounts as this endpoint will soon be deprecated.
get.description: Search users. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.search_users_v1(query="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Topsearch. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.fbsearch_topsearch_v1(query="Berlin")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Search locations. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.fbsearch_places_v1(query="Berlin", lat=None, lng=None)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Search music. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.search_music_v1(query="rock")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Search hashtags via topsearch. Returns a list of matching results.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.fbsearch_topsearch_hashtags_v1(query="Berlin")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)

get.summary: Works for stories and highlights only or use (/v1/media/by/url, /v1/story/by/url)
get.description:
Get share object by code (aGlnaGxpZ2h0OjE4MTQ2MjE2Njk4MDIyMTc0 ->
{"pk": 18146216698022176, "type": "highlight"}). Returns shared content data.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.share_by_code_v1(code="aGlnaGxpZ2h0OjE4MTQ2MjE2Njk4MDIyMTc0")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Works for stories and highlights only ig...m.com/s/aGln(link must contain /s/) or use (/v1/media/by/url, /v1/story/by/url)
get.description:
Get share object by url (
https://www.ins...ram.com/s/aGlnaGxpZ2h0OjE4MTQ2MjE2Njk4MDIyMTc0 ->
{"pk": 18146216698022176, "type": "highlight"}). Returns shared content data.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.share_by_url_v1(
    url="https://www.ins...ram.com/s/aGlnaGxpZ2h0OjE4MTQ2MjE2Njk4MDIyMTc0"
